package.name: depth_pointcloud_converter
package.description: Standalone helper package that converts the InuSensor depth image (sensor_msgs/Image, 16UC1, millimeters) plus its CameraInfo into a sensor_msgs/PointCloud2, usable as a nav2 obstacle/voxel layer source. Includes a base_link -> camera_link static TF and an RViz debug launch. Does NOT modify the inusensor_ros2_driver package.
